activation.prompt: Do a full audit of this project
Check every route for keyboard and screen-reader problems
Review the visual hierarchy, clicks, lag, and mobile layout
Is the product clear or full of AI slop?
Review component boundaries and service integration
Audit auth, dependencies, secrets, and GitHub Actions
Is this code unnecessarily complex or duplicated, and how would you simplify it?
Check for circular dependencies, dead code, and high complexity hotspots
Review this app for likely App Store rejection reasons before I submit
Check our Info.plist permissions, privacy manifest, and tracking before submission

negativeActivation.prompt: Refactor this file to reduce its complexity
Submit this build to the App Store for me
